plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Git workflow plugin with practical guidance for commit readiness, Conventional Commit drafting, staged-change hygiene, and template-aware GitHub pull request or GitLab merge request body drafting.

interface.shortDescription: Commit readiness, Conventional Commit drafting, and template-aware PR/MR body drafting.

plugins.name: java
plugins.description: Java development plugin with practical skills for syntax boundaries, language design, testing workflows, dependency decisions, performance analysis, and JDTLS-assisted editing.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Java syntax, design, testing, performance, and JDTLS workflows.

plugins.name: jdk
plugins.description: JDK development assistant with shared skills for tooling workflows, runtime diagnostics, and garbage-collection guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Shared JDK tooling, runtime diagnostics, and GC workflows.

plugins.name: kotlin
plugins.description: Kotlin development plugin with practical skills for idiomatic language design, coroutines and Flow decisions, Kotlin testing workflows, and kotlin-lsp-assisted editing.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Kotlin language, coroutine, testing, and kotlin-lsp workflows.

plugins.name: spring
plugins.description: Spring development plugin with practical skills for Spring Boot, Web, Data, transactions, observability, Batch, scheduling runtime control, Quartz job/trigger operations, Integration, Cloud, and Kafka workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Spring Boot, Web, Data, transaction, observability, Batch, scheduling, Quartz, Integration, Cloud, and Kafka skills.

plugins.name: observability-assets
plugins.description: Prometheus and Grafana plugin with practical skills for alert-rule design, recording-rule support, promtool validation, dashboard JSON authoring, and Grafana mixin workflows for version-controlled observability assets.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Prometheus alerting, recording rules, promtool, Grafana dashboard, and mixin workflows.

plugins.name: reactor
plugins.description: Project Reactor plugin with practical skills for Flux and Mono composition, scheduler selection, Sinks and ConnectableFlux hot-source design, and reactor-test workflows with StepVerifier, TestPublisher, PublisherProbe, and virtual time.

interface.shortDescription: Practical Project Reactor composition, scheduling, sinks, hot-source, and reactor-test workflows.
